mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bank_account (user_id, bank_code, account_number, account_holder_name) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bankCode}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountHolderName})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bank_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, bank_code, account_number, account_holder_name, registered_at, deleted_at FROM bank_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY registered_at DESC
